description: Replacement profile guard definition. In replacement mode (L2/L3), no symbol may call through to host glibc. In interpose mode (L0/L1), call-throughs are allowed for symbols on the interpose_allowlist. This file is the source of truth for the CI gate scripts/check_replacement_guard.sh.

interpose.description: LD_PRELOAD interpose mode. Call-through to host glibc is permitted for allowlisted modules.

replacement.description: Full glibc replacement mode. Zero call-through permitted. Every symbol must be Implemented or RawSyscall.

detection_rules.description: A call-through is any libc:: function call that is NOT a raw syscall, constant, or type reference.

interpose_allowlist.description: Modules permitted to call through to host glibc in interpose (LD_PRELOAD) mode. These modules have not yet been fully reimplemented.
interpose_allowlist.rationale: These modules currently contain direct host libc or host pthread escape hatches detected by the replacement guard source scan. Interpose mode permits them; replacement mode forbids them.

dlfcn_boundary_policy.description: dlfcn-specific boundary contract between interpose and replacement profiles.

replacement_forbidden.description: In replacement mode, these call-through patterns must be zero. The gate scans for libc:: function calls (not syscall/constant/type) and host pthread wrapper calls (host_pthread_*) and fails if any are found outside the allowlist. Additionally, pthread_mutex_* call-through is always forbidden in replacement-relevant routing paths.

call_through_census.description: Current census of direct host libc/host pthread escape hatches by ABI module, as scanned by scripts/check_replacement_guard.sh.

errno_abi.note: Host errno mirroring is routed through host_resolve helper state; no _abi.rs scan hits remain.

malloc_abi.note: Internal raw_alloc/raw_free now share the native host-resolution path, and allocator symbol fallback routes through dlfcn_abi::dlsym.

process_abi.note: Spawn-attribute signal-set roundtrips now use signal_abi helpers, and the closefrom fallback uses unistd_abi::sysconf.

rpc_abi.note: XDR stdio helpers now route through stdio_abi entrypoints, and _rpc_dtablesize uses resource_abi::getrlimit.

stdio_abi.note: tmpfile fallback now uses native mkstemp via wchar_abi, and popen cleanup reaps children through process_abi::waitpid.

stdlib_abi.note: Environment ownership keeps host-allocator semantics through malloc_abi passthrough helpers, and stdlib alias/flush/timer paths no longer emit direct libc call-throughs in _abi.rs.

termios_abi.note: In-file test helpers now route through native ABI entrypoints, so the replacement guard sees no direct libc call-throughs.

string_abi.note: Legacy regex register allocation now uses the ABI allocator path instead of direct libc calloc/free.

call_through_census.note: Census tracks direct host call-through scan patterns used by scripts/check_replacement_guard.sh.
